security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data can be modified in transit or on the contract.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not protect against malicious vote manipulation.

assumptions: The governance contract does not perform input validation on vote data.
The network connection is not secured against interception and modification.

mitigation.strategy: Implement input validation and secure communication channels.

description: An attacker may alter vote data to change the outcome of a proposal.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes may be submitted anonymously, making it difficult to hold users accountable.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks mechanisms for vote traceability and accountability.

assumptions: The system does not require user authentication or identity verification for voting.
The voting process does not record or link votes to specific users.

mitigation.strategy: Implement a system for tracking and verifying votes, possibly with cryptographic signatures and user identity verification.

description: An attacker may cast votes and deny their involvement, making it difficult to track down perpetrators of malicious activities.

security_gap.gap_description: Sensitive information may be exposed during vote submission and processing.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not protect against the exposure of sensitive vote information.

assumptions: The governance contract does not properly sanitize or protect sensitive vote data.
The system does not use encryption to secure vote transmissions.

mitigation.strategy: Implement robust data protection and encryption mechanisms to protect sensitive vote data.

description: An attacker may gain access to sensitive information about voting patterns and user preferences.
